payload.description:
Feature: Procedures optimizer metrics auth
Scenario: Signed-in user opens optimizer procedure with inline metadata state
Given an authenticated dashboard session
When the user opens a procedure detail with optimizer metadata in Procedure.metadata.state
Then optimizer charts load without API key auth mode

Scenario: Signed-in user opens optimizer procedure with offloaded state
Given an authenticated dashboard session
And Procedure.metadata.state contains _s3_key under procedures/*
When the user opens procedure detail
Then state is loaded via Amplify Storage authenticated access
And optimizer charts render from the hydrated state

Scenario: No proxy fallback
Given procedure detail view
When optimizer state is requested
Then the app does not call /api/procedure-state
payload.title: As a signed-in operator, optimizer charts load via Amplify authenticated GraphQL + Storage
